content: Task: Wire pairs.toml loading + find real overlapping markets.
Parallel delegation: Exchange Connector Dev (find real overlapping markets via API queries) + Rust Engine Dev (wire load_from_toml into main.rs).

Queried Polymarket Gamma API and Kalshi Trade API. Found 4 real overlapping markets: 3 presidential candidate markets (Newsom, DeSantis, Beshear) + Strait of Hormuz. Extracted real conditionIds, clobTokenIds, and kalshi tickers.
Wired PairStore::load_from_toml into main.rs (6 lines after DB init). Updated config/pairs.toml with 4 real market pairs. cargo check/clippy/test all pass (175 tests).
pairs.toml wired in with 4 real market pairs. TUI should now show prices.
